title: BEM-864 continue after blocked
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 12:00 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
def read(p):
    p=Path(p)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
blocked=Path('governance/protocols/BEM863_PROTOCOL_BLOCKED_RESULT.md')
runtime=load('governance/state/claude_inbound_mailbox_workflow_state.json')
results=[]
rd=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_results')
if rd.exists():
    for p in sorted(rd.glob('*.status.json')):
        try: data=json.loads(read(p))
        except Exception as exc: data={'status':'unparsed','error':str(exc),'text':read(p)[:500]}
        results.append({'path':str(p),'data':data})
wf=Path('.github/workflows/claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml')
wf_text=read(wf)
status='blocked_protocol_recorded_continue_runtime_repair'
next_action='inspect dispatch results and Claude dispatcher workflow validity; repair runtime/action proof, not protocol approval'
state={'bem':'BEM-864','status':status,'blocked_protocol_exists':blocked.exists(),'runtime_state':runtime,'dispatch_results_tail':results[-10:],'dispatcher_workflow_exists':wf.exists(),'dispatcher_has_ensure_writer':'scripts/ensure_claude_response_file.py' in wf_text,'dispatcher_has_claude_action':'anthropics/claude-code-action' in wf_text,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem864_continue_after_blocked_protocol.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem864_continue_after_blocked_protocol.md').write_text('# BEM-864 | Continue After Blocked Protocol | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem864_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-864'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem864_continue_after_blocked_protocol.json','governance/reports/bem864_continue_after_blocked_protocol.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem864_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Confirmed fail-closed BLOCKED protocol exists and continued repair by collecting runtime, dispatch result and dispatcher workflow evidence')
